name: Arduino to MicroPython - A Quick Start Guide
description: Transition from Arduino C++ to MicroPython quickly and easily. Learn Python syntax with side-by-side comparisons, control hardware, and build IoT and robotics projects on Arduino Nano ESP32, Raspberry Pi Pico W, or Pico 2W.
author: Kevin McAleer

name: Bottango Basics
description: Learn how to bring characters and props to life using Bottango, a powerful no-code motion tool for animating servos and creating interactive scenes.  This course walks you through installing Bottango, wiring servos, programming boards, and creating expressive motion sequences.
author: Kevin McAleer

name: BrachioGraph Tutorial
description: Learn how to build your own BrachioGraph, a simple drawing robot that uses two stepper motors to create beautiful drawings.  This course covers the essential steps from assembling the robot, installing the software, and creating your first drawing.
author: Kevin McAleer

name: Build your own BurgerBot
description: Build a simple round robot powered by Raspberry Pi Pico
author: Kevin McAleer

name: Getting Started with C on the Raspberry Pi Pico
description: Learn how to program the Raspberry Pi Pico using the C programming language.  This beginner-friendly course covers the fundamentals of C, how to set up your development environment,  and how to write simple programs that run on real hardware. By the end of the course, you'll have a  solid grasp of programming basics and will create your first hardware project; a blinking LED.
author: Kevin McAleer

name: Computer Vision on Raspberry Pi with CVZone
description: Computer Vision on Raspberry Pi with CVZone
author: Kevin McAleer

name: Docker
description: Learn how to use Docker to build and deploy applications in a containerised environment.
author: Kevin McAleer

name: Raspberry Pi 5 Cluster with Docker Swarm
description: This course guides beginners through the process of setting up a Raspberry Pi 5 cluster and deploying applications using Docker Swarm. Learn to build, manage, and scale a mini-computing cluster for various projects.
author: Kevin McAleer

name: DuckDB - Fast, free analytics
description: Learn how to use DuckDB, the fast, free, and embeddable database designed for analytics.
author: Kevin McAleer

name: Robot Eye Mechanism
description: Robot Eye Mechanism, is a course that will teach you how to use Fusion 360 to create a Servo controled Robot eye mechanism.
author: Kevin McAleer

name: Building User Authentication for Static Sites with FastAPI
description: This course teaches you how to build a user authentication system using Python, FastAPI, PyDantic, and SQLAlchemy for statically generated websites. You'll learn to implement features like registration, login, and user management, integrating these with a frontend built with Jekyll.
author: Kevin McAleer

name: Introduction to FreeCAD for Beginners
description: This beginner's course on FreeCAD teaches you the essentials of 3D modeling with this powerful, open-source tool. From basic shapes to more complex designs, learn the fundamentals of CAD software and how to apply them in your own projects.
author: Kevin McAleer

name: Building SMARS with FreeCAD
description: Learn to design a complete 3D-printable robot chassis from scratch using FreeCAD. This hands-on course teaches parametric CAD design, professional modeling techniques, and design-for-manufacturing principles while building the iconic SMARS robot base. Perfect for makers who want to design their own robot parts.
author: Kevin McAleer

name: How to install MicroPython
description: Install MicroPython on your Raspberry Pi Pico.
author: Kevin McAleer

name: Talking to the World - Working with I2C and SPI
description: Master I2C and SPI communication protocols on Raspberry Pi Pico. Learn to connect sensors, scan for devices, read datasheets, and build real-world projects with practical hands-on examples using the BME280 sensor.
author: Kevin McAleer

name: Intermediate level MicroPython
description: This course is designed to take you from a beginner to an intermediate level of MicroPython programming. It covers the basics of Object Oriented Programming,  Modules and Packages, DocStrings, Interrupts and Timers, and MP Remote.
author: Kevin McAleer

name: Building Websites with Jekyll
description: Learn how to build static websites using Jekyll, from basic setup to advanced features.
author: Kevin McAleer

lessons.section: Introduction to Jekyll and Static Sites
Introduction to Jekyll and Static Sites
Introduction to Jekyll and Static Sites
Introduction to Jekyll and Static Sites

name: Running K3s on Raspberry Pi
description: Learn how to build your own lightweight Kubernetes cluster using K3s and Raspberry Pi. This hands-on course will guide you through setup, configuration, networking, persistent storage, and deploying real workloads — all on affordable single-board computers. Ideal for homelabbers, IoT developers, and anyone curious about Kubernetes at the edge.
author: Kevin McAleer

name: Learn ROS with me
description: Learning ROS with me, is a course that will teach you how to use ROS2 on Raspberry Pi 4.
author: Kevin McAleer

lessons.section: Setting up the Raspberry Pi 4 environment
Setting up the Raspberry Pi 4 environment

name: How to use the Learning Platform
description: Learn how to use the new Learning Platform
author: Kevin McAleer

name: Introduction to the Linux Command Line on Raspberry Pi OS
description: Learn the fundamentals of using the Linux command line on Raspberry Pi OS. This course covers essential topics including navigation, file management, software installation, system monitoring, networking, and basic scripting.
author: Kevin McAleer

lessons.section: Getting Started with the Command Line
Getting Started with the Command Line
Getting Started with the Command Line
Getting Started with the Command Line
Final Project: Building a Simple Command Line Application
Final Project: Building a Simple Command Line Application

name: Mastering Markdown for Documentation with Jekyll
description: This comprehensive course is designed to teach you how to effectively use Markdown for creating and maintaining documentation on GitHub Pages with Jekyll. From the basics of Markdown to deploying your site, you'll learn everything you need to get started.
author: Kevin McAleer

lessons.section: Creating Content with Markdown and Jekyll
Creating Content with Markdown and Jekyll
Creating Content with Markdown and Jekyll

name: Learn MicroPython - The basics
description: Get started with MicroPython, What Python is, where to download it and which software to use to develop MicroPython code
author: Kevin McAleer

name: Raspberry Pi Pico with MicroPython - GPIO Mastery
description: Master the use of GPIO pins on the Raspberry Pi Pico with MicroPython. Learn about various types of pins, their functions, and how to work with them in real-world projects.
author: Kevin McAleer

lessons.section: Interfacing with Servos and Ultrasonic Range Finders
Interfacing with Servos and Ultrasonic Range Finders

name: MicroPython Robotics Projects with the Raspberry Pi Pico
description: Learn how to build simple yet powerful robots using the Raspberry Pi Pico and MicroPython.  This hands-on course guides you through controlling motors, reading sensors, and combining hardware to create autonomous and remotely controlled robots.  Perfect for makers ready to go beyond GPIO and start building real-world robotics projects.
author: Kevin McAleer

name: Mini-Rack 3D Design Tutorial
description: Design a 3D printable 10" mini-rack for your Raspberry Pi home lab.
author: Kevin McAleer

name: Building Object Detection Models with Raspberry Pi AI Camera
description: Learn how to build custom object detection models using the Raspberry Pi AI Camera. Train your own models with PyTorch, optimize them for edge deployment, and run real-time detection on Raspberry Pi hardware. Complete hands-on course from dataset creation to production deployment.
author: Kevin McAleer

name: Obsidian
description: Learn how to use Obsidian for note-taking and knowledge management.
author: Kevin McAleer

name: OctaPi
description: Learn how to use Crack the Enigma code using a Cluster of Raspberry Pis and Python.
author: Kevin McAleer

name: OpenClaw on Raspberry Pi
description: Learn how to set up and run OpenClaw, a powerful AI agent framework, on your Raspberry Pi using Docker.  This course covers installation, configuration, management, and production best practices for running  local AI agents on your own hardware.
author: Kevin McAleer

name: Data Manipulation with Pandas and Numpy
description: Learn how to manipulate data using Pandas and Numpy
author: Kevin McAleer

name: Building a Robot Arm with Raspberry Pi and PCA9685
description: Dive into the exciting world of robotics by learning how to control a robot arm using a Raspberry Pi, Python, and the PCA9685 board. This course covers everything from setting up your Raspberry Pi, understanding the PCA9685 board, programming with Python, to constructing and controlling a 4-servo robot arm. Perfect for beginners and enthusiasts alike, this course will guide you through each step with practical examples and hands-on projects.
author: Kevin McAleer

lessons.section: Getting Started with Raspberry Pi and Python
Getting Started with Raspberry Pi and Python
Getting Started with Raspberry Pi and Python

name: Using the Raspberry Pi Pico's Built-in Temperature Sensor
description: Learn how to use the Raspberry Pi Pico's built-in temperature sensor to measure and display temperature readings  in the Thonny console. This course is designed for beginners and covers the fundamentals of MicroPython programming,  understanding the Pico's ADC, and creating your first temperature monitoring project.  Through step-by-step tutorials and practical examples, you'll gain the skills to confidently use the Pico for sensor-based projects.
author: Kevin McAleer

lessons.section: Introduction to the Raspberry Pi Pico and MicroPython
Introduction to the Raspberry Pi Pico and MicroPython
Introduction to the Raspberry Pi Pico and MicroPython
Writing Your First Temperature Sensor Script
Writing Your First Temperature Sensor Script
Writing Your First Temperature Sensor Script

name: From Docker to Podman
description: Learn how to transition from Docker to Podman and unlock better container workflows  with rootless and daemonless architecture. This hands-on course covers everything from  architectural differences and CLI compatibility to unique Podman features like systemd integration  and Kubernetes support. Perfect for developers and DevOps professionals looking to modernize  their container workflows.
author: Kevin McAleer

name: Mastering Pydantic for Robust Data Validation
description: This in-depth course is designed to teach you how to leverage Pydantic for data validation and settings management in Python applications. From understanding Pydantic's basics to integrating it with FastAPI for web development, you'll master everything needed to use Pydantic effectively.
author: Kevin McAleer

name: Python for beginners
description: Get started with Python programming, learn why you should  learn Python and how to setup your Python environment.
author: Kevin McAleer

name: Using Redis with Python
description: Learn how to use Redis with Python to build fast, scalable applications.
author: Kevin McAleer

name: Reinforcement Learning for Beginners
description: Teach your robot to learn — instead of hardcoding every behaviour, use tabular Q-learning to let it discover through trial and error how to navigate obstacles on its own. Train a policy in a pure-Python grid-world simulation on your laptop, then export the frozen Q-table as JSON and deploy it to a Pico-powered differential-drive robot running MicroPython.
author: Kevin McAleer

lessons.section: Bringing It to the Real World
Bringing It to the Real World
Bringing It to the Real World
Bringing It to the Real World
Bringing It to the Real World

name: Robotics 101
description: Learning ROS with me, is a course that will teach you how to use ROS2 on Raspberry Pi 4.
author: Kevin McAleer

name: Introduction to Rust
description: Learning Rust with me, is a course that will teach you how to use Rust on Raspberry Pi.
author: Kevin McAleer

name: Wall Drawing Robot Tutorial
description: Learn how to build your own wall drawing robot using a Raspberry Pi Zero 2 W, stepper motors, and a gondola with a marker.  This course covers the essential steps from assembling the robot, installing the software, and creating your first drawing.
author: Kevin McAleer

name: SMARS
description: Learn how to 3d print, build and program a SMARS robot
author: Kevin McAleer

name: Learn how to program SMARS with Arduino
description: Learn how to program SMARS with Arduino
author: Kevin McAleer

name: Build a SMARS Robot in Fusion 360
description: Learn how to design a robot in 3d using Fusion 360
author: Kevin McAleer

name: SMARS Quad
description: Learn how to 3d print, build and program a SMARS Quad robot
author: Kevin McAleer

name: Getting Started with SQL
description: Learn the fundamentals of SQL, relational database theory, and essential skills for database management.
author: Kevin McAleer

name: Create Databases with Python and SQLite3
description: Learn how to create databases in Python with sqlite3
author: Kevin McAleer
